js: (function(){const snap=window.__t5_rewardSnap;const rs=snap?.runState;const issues=[];const setFields=['consumedRewardFactIds','factsAnsweredCorrectly','factsAnsweredIncorrectly'];for(const f of setFields){if(rs&&f in rs){const v=rs[f];if(v&&typeof v==='object'&&!Array.isArray(v)&&v.__type!=='Set'){issues.push('BAD_FIELD_'+f+':'+JSON.stringify(v).slice(0,50))}}}return JSON.stringify({sub3_result:issues.length===0?'PASS':'FAIL',screen_ok:window.__rrPlay?.getScreen?.()===snap?.screen,issues:issues})})()
